tool_args.label: NYCT Total Workforce as of June 30, 2022
tool_args.raw_text: As of June 30, 2022 , NYCT's workforce consisted of 46,707 employees of which females represented 18% (8,537) and minorities represented 81% (37,893) of the total workforce.

tool_args.label: Empowering Women in Transportation March 2022 Events
tool_args.raw_text: March – Empowering Women in Transportation (EWT) joined 100+ employees and MTA colleagues for a series of events celebrating 'Women Providing Healing, Promoting Hope'.

payload.claim_text: March – Empowering Women in Transportation (EWT) joined 100+ employees and MTA colleagues for a series of events celebrating 'Women Providing Healing, Promoting Hope'.
payload.subject: MTA Employee Resource Groups

tool_args.label: Pride Express April 2022
tool_args.raw_text: April – Pride Express facilitated a lunch and learn utilizing games to educate employees of famous individuals within the LGBTQ+ community. They also informed participants of their upcoming events.

payload.claim_text: April – Pride Express facilitated a lunch and learn utilizing games to educate employees of famous individuals within the LGBTQ+ community. They also informed participants of their upcoming events.
payload.subject: MTA Employee Resource Groups

tool_args.label: DDCR All-Agency ERG Membership Drive May 2022
tool_args.raw_text: May – DDCR launched an All-Agency ERG Membership Drive. Over seven hundred (700+) members from all agencies joined one or more of the 9 Employee Resource Groups.

payload.claim_text: May – DDCR launched an All-Agency ERG Membership Drive. Over seven hundred (700+) members from all agencies joined one or more of the 9 Employee Resource Groups.
payload.subject: MTA Employee Resource Groups

tool_args.label: Veterans ERG Memorial Day Celebration May 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Veterans – Memorial Day Celebration - The MTA Veteran's Employee Resource Group (ERG) held a noontime observance on May 26 at 130 Livingston in Brooklyn. They also visited the WWII Memorial Wall that includes the names of MTA workers who paid the ultimate sacrifice during WWII.

payload.claim_text: Veterans – Memorial Day Celebration - The MTA Veteran's Employee Resource Group (ERG) held a noontime observance on May 26 at 130 Livingston in Brooklyn.
payload.subject: MTA Veterans ERG

tool_args.label: B.E.G.I.N. Juneteenth Celebration June 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Black Employee Group for Inclusion and Networking (B.E.G.I.N.) – Hosted a celebration in honor of Juneteenth (June 19th). B.E.G.I.N. held a 2.5-mile walk in honor and celebration of the 'Opal Walk for Freedom' a walking campaign started by Ms. Lee Opal to make Juneteenth a national holiday.

payload.claim_text: Black Employee Group for Inclusion and Networking (B.E.G.I.N.) – Hosted a celebration in honor of Juneteenth (June 19th). B.E.G.I.N. held a 2.5-mile walk in honor and celebration of the 'Opal Walk for Freedom'.
payload.subject: MTA B.E.G.I.N. ERG

tool_args.label: TransportAsian, Multicultural, Latinos & Friends Cross Cultural Exchange
tool_args.raw_text: TransportAsian, Multicultural and Latinos & Friends - Hosted a Cross Cultural Exchange discussion to exchange distinct ideas, experiences and perspectives on culture, identify and more.

payload.claim_text: TransportAsian, Multicultural and Latinos & Friends - Hosted a Cross Cultural Exchange discussion to exchange distinct ideas, experiences and perspectives on culture, identify and more.
payload.subject: MTA Employee Resource Groups

tool_args.label: Pride Express Stonewall Walking Tour June 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Pride Express – In commemoration of the 53rd anniversary of the Stonewall Uprising Pride Express conducted a historical walking tour to the Stonewall National Monument. Also, a Lunch and Learn on LGBTQ+ history was held with a focus on Stonewall.

payload.claim_text: Pride Express – In commemoration of the 53rd anniversary of the Stonewall Uprising Pride Express conducted a historical walking tour to the Stonewall National Monument. Also, a Lunch and Learn on LGBTQ+ history was held with a focus on Stonewall.
payload.subject: MTA Pride Express ERG
